safety.setup: Creates one temporary metaobject definition and one temporary metaobject entry on the disposable conformance shop, then deletes both before writing the successful fixture.
safety.paritySpecs: No parity spec is checked in for this fixture yet because the local proxy has no executable metaobject snapshot/read model to compare against without inventing data.
